label: Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption

node.label: Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption
node.definition: A model learns to reverse a gradual noising process or estimate its score field.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption is to connect Score matching & denoising score objectives, Differential equations to downstream capabilities including Diffusion & score-based models.
examples: combined with Score matching & denoising score objectives
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Score matching & denoising score objectives, Differential equations.

dependencies.rationale: Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption uses Score matching & denoising score objectives as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption uses Differential equations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
